title: Texas School Guardian Program (TSGP)
description: Comprehensive school protection training for designated guardians covering threat assessment, active shooter response, and emergency protocols in educational environments.

title: Active Shooter Response (A1209)
description: Certified active shooter response training for law enforcement officers covering rapid deployment, threat neutralization, and casualty care integration in active threat scenarios.

title: Church/House of Worship Security Program
description: Security planning and response training for houses of worship. Covers threat assessment, security team organization, surveillance detection, and response protocols for religious facilities.

title: Workplace Violence Prevention
description: Comprehensive workplace violence prevention training covering threat indicators, de-escalation techniques, policy development, and incident response for corporate environments.

title: NDLE Stop the Bleed
description: National Defense Life-saving Education course teaching hemorrhage control, tourniquet application, wound packing, and emergency trauma care for first responders and civilians.

title: Civilian In-transition Training (A1005)
description: Comprehensive training program for civilians transitioning from military service covering resume building, interview skills, and civilian sector adaptation.

title: Countering Domestic Violence & Human Trafficking (A1031)
description: Advanced training for law enforcement on identifying, investigating, and responding to domestic violence and human trafficking cases including victim advocacy.

title: Crisis Communications (A1030)
description: Training on effective communication during crisis situations including media relations, public information dissemination, and inter-agency coordination protocols.

title: Core Security (A1019)
description: Foundational security principles training covering physical security, access control, surveillance systems, and security program management for professionals.

title: Asset Forfeiture (A1036)
description: Certified training on asset forfeiture laws, procedures, and investigative techniques for law enforcement agencies and prosecutors.

title: Basic Crime Prevention/Community Policing Concepts (A1002)
description: Comprehensive community-oriented policing strategies including crime prevention through environmental design, neighborhood watch programs, and community partnership development.

title: Child Safety (Back Alert List) (A1032)
description: Training on child safety protocols, sex offender registry management, alert systems, and community notification procedures for law enforcement personnel.

title: e-Advanced Diversity Awareness
description: Online continuing education course on advanced diversity, equity, and inclusion principles for law enforcement professionals.

title: Cybersecurity Awareness Training (A1106)
description: Essential cybersecurity awareness training covering social engineering, phishing prevention, password security, and digital evidence handling for law enforcement.

title: Information Crime on the Internet/Prison System (A1017)
description: Specialized training on investigating internet crimes originating from or targeting correctional facilities, including contraband communications and cyber threats.

title: Elderly Abuse & Financial Crimes (A1047)
description: Training on identifying, investigating, and prosecuting elder abuse and financial exploitation cases including asset recovery and victim services.

title: Ethics Based Leadership in Law Enforcement
description: Leadership development course focusing on ethical decision-making, professional standards, accountability, and building trust in law enforcement organizations.

title: Fingerprint/Forensic & Bio-Crime Enforcement Systems (A1011)
description: Advanced forensic identification training covering fingerprint analysis, DNA evidence collection, biometric systems, and forensic technology applications.

title: Building & Wellness Building a Resilient Law Enforcement (A1100)
description: Wellness and resilience training for law enforcement covering stress management, mental health awareness, peer support, and organizational wellness programs.

title: Fire Investigator/Arson/Incident Review Course (A1005)
description: Comprehensive fire investigation training covering origin and cause determination, arson investigation techniques, evidence collection, and court testimony preparation.

title: Training Advisory Board (#3003)
description: Administrative training for training advisory board members covering curriculum development, standards compliance, program evaluation, and policy implementation.

title: Use of Force Refresher (#2008)
description: Annual use of force refresher training covering legal updates, policy changes, de-escalation techniques, and force continuum review for certified officers.

title: Visual Observer for Drones (#4053)
description: Technical training on visual observer responsibilities for UAS/drone operations including airspace awareness, communication protocols, and emergency procedures.

title: Traffic Direction & Situational Awareness (#2075)
description: Practical training on traffic direction, accident scene management, situational awareness techniques, and officer safety during roadway operations.

title: Human Trafficking (A1227)
description: Advanced investigative training on human trafficking identification, victim-centered approaches, multi-agency task force operations, and prosecution strategies.

title: Identity Theft (A1227)
description: Comprehensive identity theft investigation training covering digital forensics, financial crimes analysis, victim recovery assistance, and prosecution preparation.

title: Intermediate Child Abuse Prevention & Investigation (A1020)
description: Intermediate-level training on child abuse investigation techniques, forensic interviewing, multi-disciplinary team approaches, and case management strategies.

title: Incident Command System Resources (A1040)
description: Training on the Incident Command System (ICS) for managing multi-agency emergency response operations including resource allocation and span of control.

title: Innovative Procedures using Science (A1025)
description: Cutting-edge training on applying scientific methods and technology to law enforcement procedures including evidence analysis and investigative techniques.

title: Dental Profiling (A1548)
description: Forensic odontology training for law enforcement covering dental identification, bite mark analysis, mass disaster victim identification, and expert testimony.

title: Emergence of Child Illness & Neglect (A1033)
description: Training on recognizing and investigating child illness fabrication, medical neglect, and Munchausen by proxy cases for law enforcement and child protective services.

title: DNAAS Trafficking Identification and Response (A1058)
description: DNA-assisted analysis system training for trafficking identification, evidence collection protocols, and database utilization for human trafficking investigations.

title: Gang Violence Intervention Methods/Strategies
description: Comprehensive gang intervention training covering intelligence gathering, community-based strategies, suppression techniques, and prevention program development.

title: Handcuffing Techniques (A2812)
description: Practical skills training on proper handcuffing techniques, restraint procedures, subject control, and officer safety during custody situations.

title: How Adults Learn (A1ST08)
description: Instructor development course on adult learning principles, training methodology, curriculum design, and effective presentation techniques for law enforcement trainers.

title: Intermediate Spanish for Law Enforcement (A1178)
description: Language skills training for law enforcement officers covering field communication, Miranda rights delivery, report writing, and community interaction in Spanish.

title: Special Investigation Topic (A2522)
description: Advanced special investigations training covering undercover operations, surveillance techniques, informant management, and complex case development methodologies.

title: Tactical Trauma Care (A1036)
description: Advanced tactical medicine training covering TCCC protocols, hemorrhage control, airway management, and casualty evacuation in tactical environments.

title: Trainer for Counter Terrorism (A1073)
description: Train-the-trainer course for counter-terrorism instruction covering curriculum delivery, scenario-based training development, and assessment methodology.
